channel.title: About on Mattia Guerini
channel.description: Recent content in About on Mattia Guerini

item.title: About
item.description: Hello! My name is Mattia Guerini and I am assistant professor in econometrics at the University of Brescia. I’ve obtained my PhD at the Sant’Anna School for Advanced Studies and I’ve then served as a post-doctorate for the OFCE-SciencesPo and as a Marie Sklodowska-Curie fellow at GREDEG, Universtity Côte d’Azur. Research Interest Topics: macroeconomics, industry dynamics, monetary economics. Methods: agent-based models, econometrics, validation and calibration.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Mailing Address mattia.guerini@unibs.it Mattia Guerini Università di Brescia Dipartimento di Economia e Management 74/b, via San Faustino 25122, Brescia – Italia Links Google Scholar GitHub Orcid Twitter

item.title: Policy
item.description: Policy Briefs and Articles for Public Debate All writings in each category are in reverse chronological order. in english Guerini M., Nesta L., Ragot X., Schiavo S. (2020). Firm liquidity and solvency under the Covid-19 lockdown in France. OFCE Policy Brief n.76. Antonin C., Guerini M., Napoletano M. and Vona F. (2019). Italy: Escaping the high-debt and low-growth trap. OFCE Policy Brief n.56. Battiston S., Guerini M., Napoletano M. and Stobova V.

item.title: Publications
item.description: All publications are in chronological order. Peer Reviewed Publications Guerini M., Moneta A. (2017). A method for agent-based models validation – Journal of Economics Dynamics and Control, vol.82, 125-141. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jedc.2017.06.001 Guerini M., Napoletano M., Roventini A. (2018). No man is an Island: the impact of heterogeneity and local interactions on macroeconomic dynamics – Economic Modelling, vol.68, 82-95. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.econmod.2017.05.004 Guerini M., Lamperti F., Mazzocchetti A. (2018).
